name: Liars in Love
overview: It tells the story of a girl who, upon learning that the orphanage where she grew up as a child is to be demolished because of a company project, decides to enter the business world to get closer to the Chu family heir.

trailers.title: Trailer: The Heart Hunt Game Begins | Liars in Love 无法抗拒的谎言 | iQIYI
